zh-CN.summary: 夏邑缘品荟创味菜 - 智能餐饮服务与菜品推荐助手
examplePhrases: 帮我查查有什么好吃的
我要点一份香辣酥排骨
zh-CN.name: 夏邑缘品荟创味菜
zh-CN.description:
夏邑缘品荟创味菜是一款智能餐饮服务助手，可以帮您：

🍽 菜品推荐：根据您的口味、预算智能推荐招牌菜、特色硬菜
📋 查看菜单：浏览完整菜单，支持按分类查询
🛒 自助点餐：语音或文字点餐，轻松下单
📍 门店查询：获取门店地址、营业时间
📶 WiFi连接：快速获取WiFi密码
🖨️ 小票打印：自动打印订单到后厨

支持6大菜品分类：招牌菜、特色硬菜、宴请首选、餐前开胃、家常炒菜、汤羹主食，共120道精选菜品。

开发者：石中伟

en-US.summary: Xiayi Youpinhui - Smart restaurant service and dish recommendation assistant
examplePhrases: I want to order spicy ribs
en-US.name: Xiayi Youpinhui Foodie
en-US.description:
Xiayi Youpinhui Foodie is a smart restaurant service assistant that helps you:

🍽 Dish Recommendation: Recommends signature dishes based on your taste and budget
📋 Browse Menu: View complete menu with category filtering
🛒 Self-Ordering: Order by voice or text with ease
📍 Store Information: Get store address and business hours
📶 WiFi Access: Quick WiFi password retrieval
🖨️ Receipt Printing: Auto-print orders to kitchen

Supports 6 dish categories: Signature Dishes, Specialty Mains, Banquet Favorites, Appetizers, Home-style Dishes, Soups & Beverages, with 120 carefully selected dishes.

Developer: 石中伟 (Shi Zhongwei)

publishingInformation.testingInstructions:
Sample testing instructions:
1. Say 'Alexa, open 夏邑缘品荟' to launch the skill
2. Say '推荐一道招牌菜' to get a signature dish recommendation
3. Say '我要点香辣酥排骨' to place an order
4. Say '告诉我WiFi密码' to get WiFi info
5. Say '查询门店地址' to find store location
